items.name: My-Brain-Is-Full-Crew
items.description: Built by a PhD whose memory was failing, whose diet was a mess, and whose anxiety had its own agenda. Most second brain tools ignore the fact that your brain doesn't work in isolation: your body and your mental health are part of the system too. This crew handles all three: knowledge, nutrition, and mental wellness.
